dialogues.prompt: The coffee machine hums. The pot is half full. The pot has been half full for three hours.
Someone wrote 'pls clean me — humanity is counting on you' on a sticky note above the carafe. The note is older than the carafe.
The intern looks up. "Wait, is the standup canceled? Or does it just feel that way?"
The intern catches you in the hallway. "Got a sec? Quick question about the staging deploy."

options.label: Sure, walk and talk
options.flavor: Five minutes turns into fifteen. They had it almost right.

options.label: Maybe later
options.flavor: You say later. You both know later sometimes means never.
